# Huang Zhuofei ## Mac OS上配置Raspberry Pi的ARM交叉编译环境 1. 下载编译工具链 ARMx-2009q3-67.tar.bz2 2. 新建一个磁盘映像: 打开 Disk Utility -> File -> New Image -> Blank Image... [

Read More...

](ARM_Cross.html) ## Start Raspberry Pi Now we start to use Raspberry Pi... [

Read More...

](StartRpi.html) ## Install Xilinx ISE 14.7 on Windows 10 The problem is, default xilinx barely works in 64-bit mode on Windows 8 :palm: The license manager and Project Navigator both just close when you try to open a file and PlanAhead only works in 32-bit mode. Now we do some extra jobs to make it works. [
